Mordekaiser.name: Mordekaiser
Mordekaiser.title: the Iron Revenant
Mordekaiser.lore: Twice slain and thrice born, Mordekaiser is a brutal warlord from a foregone epoch.

passive.name: Darkness Rise
passive.description: Mordekaiser gains a powerful damage aura and movement speed after landing 3 attacks or spells against champions.

spells.name: Obliterate
spells.description: Mordekaiser smashes the ground with his mace.
spells.tooltip: Smash the ground dealing {{ totaldamage }} damage.

spells.name: Indestructible
spells.description: Mordekaiser stores damage to form a shield.

spells.name: Realm of Death
spells.description: Mordekaiser drags his victim to the Death Realm.
spells.tooltip: Banish a champion for {{ rduration }} seconds.
